Reception Dashboard
The command center for front-desk staff - check in clients, view the schedule, and communicate with the team from one screen.
02
Client File
Complete patient record in two clicks - visit history, billing, vaccinations, and active medications in one unified view.
03
Scheduling Calendar
Day view with per-vet columns, live occupancy bars, and inline booking - no page navigation required.
